mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_favorites (user_id, story_id, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{storyId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND story_id = #{storyId}
mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.title, s.description, s.category, s.duration, s.duration_seconds, s.icon, s.gradient_colors, s.audio_url, s.is_generated, s.is_favorite, s.rating, s.play_count, s.content, s.created_at, s.updated_at FROM user_favorites uf INNER JOIN stories s ON uf.story_id = s.id WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY uf.created_at DESC
